_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Support the CIO in the formulation of cyber-related policies.
reference_document_element_description: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-005 (AG, cosine: 0.446), AG-T-004 (AG, cosine: 0.441).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.8/10 (raw 0.280). Shared vocabulary: [policies]. DCWF-only terms [cio, cyber, formulation, related, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.899, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.046 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Support the CIO in the formulation of cyber-related policies." and "Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies coverin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.512 > STS 0.280 (gap +0.232). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [policies] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [policies]. DCWF-only: [cio, cyber, formulation, related, support]. WIDAI-only: [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.232 with low STS 0.280. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
